---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an OSINTPRO feature or workflow improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Use Case

Describe the domain intelligence, brand monitoring, social OSINT, wallet OSINT or reporting workflow this would improve.

## Expected Outcome

What should the user be able to do after this feature exists?

## Passive Data Sources

List the public/passive sources involved, if known.

## Safety Notes

Confirm that this request does not require exploit execution, brute force, credential attacks, invasive scanning, wallet movement or evasion guidance.
